summary: Backend testing for Arabic Arena new features (custom questions, image flags, quote questions, auto-advance). All backend behaviors verified against public URL.
passed: POST /api/rooms/custom_question rejects a out of 0-3 range (400)
POST /api/rooms/custom_question rejects when game state != lobby (400)
image_questions.capitals contains 18 items (>=18 required), 16 flag-type questions
Auto-advance via POST /api/rooms/tick: clears duel + pending_action + calls next_turn after pending_action.until
Auto-advance in GET /api/rooms/{code}/state also clears duel & advances turn without needing tick
Full flow: create -> join(2) -> start -> attack -> answer -> resolve works end-to-end
